'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 70''' was the seventieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 30]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Rise of Prince [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]
*[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]]
*[[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]]
*[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[Handmaiden/Legends|Handmaidens]]
*[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] - [[Reactor/Legends|Core]]
*[[Metrocab Robo-Hack Landspeeder|Robo-Hack]]
*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] Weapons
*[[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian Starfighter]]
